kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-E2E-03 Transfer Funds and Check Balance via API

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Create Savings Account
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=type' by label SAVINGS.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=fromAccountId' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Create a savings account with the provided details

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/12456/transactions path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/12456/transactions headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/12456/transactions status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:47:05 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e981b83e1f8a21-BOM'} body=[{"id":14809,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":19249,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":26797,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":-50.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":29017,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":29239,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":25.50,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":32791,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":-100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":33013,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":35233,"accountId":12456,"type":"Credit","date":1781913600000,"amount":150.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"}]

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Transfer funds through UI and verify the transfer is reflected via API.
